property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-25.0.2.10-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-25.0.2.10-hotspot\bin;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Python313\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Intel\iCLS Client\;C:\Program Files\Intel\iCLS Client\;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Intel\Intel(R) Management Engine Components\DAL;C:\Program Files\Intel\Intel(R) Management Engine Components\DAL;C:\Program Files (x86)\Intel\Intel(R) Management Engine Components\IPT;C:\Program Files\Intel\Intel(R) Management Engine Components\IPT;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\Intel\WiFi\bin\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Intel\WirelessCommon\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\CMake\bin;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\maven\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin;C:\Users\rcvau\.local\bin;C:\Users\rcvau\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Scripts\;C:\Users\rcvau\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\;C:\Users\rcvau\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\rcvau\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\rcvau\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\rcvau\AppData\Local\Programs\cursor\resources\app\bin;C:\Users\rcvau\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin;C:\Users\rcvau\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\astral-sh.uv_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe;C:\Users\rcvau\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\rcvau\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\BrechtSanders.WinLibs.POSIX.UCRT_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\mingw64\bin;;.

testcase.name: Board size selection - Easy/Small mode
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Easy/Small mode &amp#27;[90m# features/board_size_selection.feature:5&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe menu is presented&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.theMenuIsPresented()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI select the small board&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.iSelectTheSmallBoard()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe board should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m9&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mx&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m9&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m10&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m mines&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.theBoardShouldBe(int,int,int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Board size selection - Medium mode
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Medium mode &amp#27;[90m# features/board_size_selection.feature:10&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe menu is presented&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.theMenuIsPresented()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI select the medium board&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.iSelectTheMediumBoard()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe board should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m16&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mx&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m16&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m40&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m mines&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.theBoardShouldBe(int,int,int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Board size selection - Hard/Large mode
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Hard/Large mode &amp#27;[90m# features/board_size_selection.feature:15&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe menu is presented&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.theMenuIsPresented()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI select the large board&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.iSelectTheLargeBoard()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe board should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m30&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mx&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m16&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m99&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m mines&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.theBoardShouldBe(int,int,int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Help page toggle - Help page lists the navigation control
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Help page lists the navigation control &amp#27;[90m# features/help_page.feature:5&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI am in an active game&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.HelpPageSteps.iAmInAnActiveGame()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI open the help page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.HelpPageSteps.iOpenTheHelpPage()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe help page should contain &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Arrow Keys"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m as a listed control&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.HelpPageSteps.theHelpPageShouldContainAsAListedControl(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Help page toggle - Help page lists the flag placement control
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Help page lists the flag placement control &amp#27;[90m# features/help_page.feature:10&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI am in an active game&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.HelpPageSteps.iAmInAnActiveGame()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI open the help page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.HelpPageSteps.iOpenTheHelpPage()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe help page should contain &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"SPACE"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m as a listed control&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.HelpPageSteps.theHelpPageShouldContainAsAListedControl(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Help page toggle - Help page lists the quit control
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Help page lists the quit control &amp#27;[90m# features/help_page.feature:15&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI am in an active game&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.HelpPageSteps.iAmInAnActiveGame()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI open the help page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.HelpPageSteps.iOpenTheHelpPage()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe help page should contain &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"q or Q"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m as a listed control&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.HelpPageSteps.theHelpPageShouldContainAsAListedControl(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m
